next_steps: Antinuclear antibody (ANA) panel with ENA and complement levels
Chest CT (HRCT) to evaluate for airway or parenchymal disease
Urinalysis with microscopic examination for red cell casts
Rapid plasma reagin (RPR) or treponemal specific test
Treponemal specific antibody test and RPR
ANA panel, ENA, and complement levels (C3, C4)
Peripheral blood smear review for macrocytosis and vacuoles
Serum ferritin and glycosylated ferritin level
Skin biopsy with histology, culture, and direct immunofluorescence
Urinalysis with microscopy for red cell casts
